prompt:
Update the flux flake input to pick up latest changes from gunk-dev/flux main branch.

## Problem
The infra repo's flake.lock has the flux input pinned at commit 0f5bdb5, which is missing recent fixes (timer.js/manifest.json not included in nix package, import/export feature, workflow migration).

## Fix
Run:
```
nix flake update flux
```

This updates only the flux input in flake.lock to the latest commit on gunk-dev/flux main.

Then verify the build still works:
```
nix build .#oci-image
```

## Acceptance criteria
- flake.lock flux input points to a commit that includes the timer.js fix (commit after 8246a0d)
- `nix build .#oci-image` succeeds
